zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Ingersoll於1612年12月12日出生在英國貝德福爾桑迪時，她的父親Richard Ingersoll25歲，母親Ann Langley23歲。她於大約1630年與William Josiah Wolcott在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1629年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。她去世於1644年6月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆享年31歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Ingersoll于1612年12月12日出生在英国貝德福爾桑迪时，她的父亲Richard Ingersoll25岁，母亲Ann Langley23岁。她于大约1630年与William Josiah Wolcott在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼薩萊姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1629年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。她去世于1644年6月在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆享年31岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可薩萊姆。

nameMeanings.name: Ingersoll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Inkersall in Staveley (Derbyshire). The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Hynkere (genitive Hynkeres) ‘limper’ + Old English hyll ‘hill’. Compare Ingerson 2.

History: The Ingersoll name in America dates back to John Ingersoll, who emigrated to the Massachusetts Bay Colony in 1629. His descendants include lawyers, public officials, and politicians in CT and PA.

variants.name: Ingerson
meanings: English (Devon): from the Middle English personal name Inger + -son. Inger is from the Old Norse name Yngvarr, Ingvar, whose later form was Ívarr (see Iverson 2).

Americanized form of Swedish Ingersson and probably also of Danish Ingersen, respectively an extinct and very rare patronymics from the male personal name Inger, from Old Norse Ingvarr, a compound of Ing (the name of a Norse god associated with fertility) + arr ‘warrior’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Ingersoll was born on 12 December 1612, in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, her father, Richard Ingersoll, was 25 and her mother, Ann Langley, was 23. She married William Josiah Wolcott about 1630, in Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She immigrated to Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1629. She died in June 1644, in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 31, and was buried in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Ingersoll est née le 12 décembre 1612, à Sandy, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Ingersoll, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Ann Langley, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Josiah Wolcott environ 1630, à Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle a immigré au Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1629. Elle est décédée en juin 1644, à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Ingersoll am 12. Dezember 1612 in Sandy, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Ingersoll 25 und ihre Mutter Ann Langley 23. Sie hat um 1630 in Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America William Josiah Wolcott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie ist 1629 nach Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Sie starb im Juni 1644 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ingersoll è nata il il 12 dicembre 1612 nel Sandy, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, Richard Ingersoll, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Ann Langley, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William Josiah Wolcott circa 1630, nel Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Immigrata nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1629. Morì nel giugno 1644, nel Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Ingersollが1612年12月12日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアサンディで生まれた時，父Richard Ingersollは25歳，母Ann Langleyは23歳であった。約1630年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーサレムでWilliam Josiah Wolcottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1629年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに移住した。彼女は1644年6月にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサレムで31歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスサレムにて埋葬された。

ko.Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘
ko.Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘
ko.Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 살렘
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Ingersoll(이)가 1612년 12월 12일 영국 베드퍼드실르 샌디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Ingersoll(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Langley(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1630년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 살렘에서 William Josiah Wolcott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1629년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그녀는 1644년 6월 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 살렘에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Ingersoll nasceu em 12 de dezembro de 1612, em Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Ingersoll, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Ann Langley, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William Josiah Wolcott aproximadamente 1630, em Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela imigrou para o Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1629. Ela faleceu em junho de 1644, em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Ingersoll родилась 12 декабря 1612 г. в местности сэнди, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Ingersoll было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Langley, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Josiah Wolcott около 1630 г. в местности сеилем, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она иммигрировала в плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1629 году. Она умерла июнь 1644 г. в местности сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности сеилем, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Ingersoll nació el 12 de diciembre de 1612, en Sandy, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Ingersoll, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Ann Langley, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William Josiah Wolcott aproximadamente 1630, en Salem, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Inmigró a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1629. Murió en junio de 1644, en Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en Salem, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
